factors.rationale: The product is the dominant focal point and easily identifiable.
The accessory is shown being held, indicating a clear use case.
The text highlights a specific benefit related to style and attachment.
The layout is clear, with readable text and no distractions.
The image shows details of the product's finish and design.
The brand name is visible, providing a trust signal.
The image has strong contrast and clear subject boundaries.
The image conveys a clear campaign message with a lifestyle context.
